    (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _) ⟨M^2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq' (by linarith [norm_nonneg (f n)]) (hM n)⟩
  -- Convert ℝ≥0 convex hull to ℝ convex hull

    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff]
    intro ε εpos
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cauchy (ε^2/2) (by positivity)
    use N
    intro n m hn hm
    have h := hN n m hn hm
    rw [dist_eq_norm]
    -- Use parallelogram law: ‖a - b‖² + ‖a + b‖² = 2‖a‖² + 2‖b‖²
    -- So ‖a - b‖² = 2‖a‖² + 2‖b‖² - ‖a + b‖² = 4(½‖a‖² + ½‖b‖² - ‖(a+b)/2‖²)
    have key : ‖g n - g m‖^2 = 2 * ‖g n‖^2 + 2 * ‖g m‖^2 - ‖g n + g m‖^2 := by
      have := @parallelogram_law_with_norm ℝ E _ _ (g n) (g m)

      simp only [NNReal.smul_def, NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_ofNat]
      rw [norm_smul, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) < 2⁻¹)]
      ring_nf
      linarith [key]
    rw [h2] at h ⊢
    have h3 : 4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2) < 4 * (ε^2/2) := by
      exact mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left h (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) < 4)
    have h4 : 4 * (ε^2/2) = 2 * ε^2 := by ring
    rw [h4] at h3
    have h5 : ‖g n - g m‖^2 < 2 * ε^2 := h3
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖g n - g m‖, sq_nonneg ε, norm_nonneg (g n - g m)]
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete hg_cauchy'
  exact ⟨g, x, hg_mem', hx⟩

    have h3 : ‖g n - g m‖² < ε ^ 2 := by linarith
    rw [dist_eq_norm]
    exact sq_lt_sq' (by linarith [norm_nonneg (g n - g m)]) h3 |>.2
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete hCauchy
  exact ⟨g, x, hg_mem', hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_cauchy⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2) 
    (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _) ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq' (by linarith [norm_nonneg (f n)]) (hM n)⟩
  have hg_mem' : ∀ n, g n ∈ convexHull ℝ (Set.range fun m ↦ f (n + m)) := fun n ↦ 
    NNReal.convexHull_eq_convexHull ℝ _ ▸ hg_mem n
  have hCauchy : CauchySeq g := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff]
    intro ε hε
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cauchy (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ ?_⟩
    have key := hN n m hn hm
    have h1 : ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2 = (1/4) * ‖g n + g m‖ ^ 2 := by
      rw [norm_smul, NNReal.norm_eq]; ring
    have h2 : ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 = 2 * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2 * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖g n + g m‖ ^ 2 := by
      simp only [sq, ← @inner_self_eq_norm_sq ℝ, inner_sub_sub_self, inner_add_add_self]; ring
    have h3 : 2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2 = 
              (1/4) * ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 := by rw [h1, h2]; ring
    rw [h3] at key
    rw [dist_eq_norm]
    nlinarith [sq_nonneg ‖g n - g m‖, norm_nonneg (g n - g m)]
  exact ⟨_, hCauchy.tendsto_limUnder, hg_mem', hCauchy.tendsto_limUnder⟩
